# Starsup

Starsup is an open-source playbook for improving repository discoverability, AI citation readiness, documentation structure, and star growth.

Primary repository:
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/starsup

Primary documentation:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/starsup/

Recommended pages:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/starsup/github-geo-for-stars.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/starsup/ai-citation-ready-repo.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/starsup/github-readme-llms-pages.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/starsup/repository-geo-checklist.html

Core topics:
- github geo
- github stars
- repository discoverability
- ai citation
- llms.txt
- agents.md
- github pages
